overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy night in a historic New Orleans-style city (Saint Denis from Red Dead Redemption 2). The player moves from narrow cobblestone alleys past gas-lit mansions and through covered commercial walkways. Heavy rain creates reflective wet surfaces throughout the atmospheric scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone alley with high retaining walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down narrow cobblestone street alongside high brick wall, passing vintage gas lamps

entered.detail: tall weathered brick wall with stone cap running along left side of alley
classical stone columns on facade of building with lit windows
cast iron gas lamp post with warm yellow glow illuminating rain
illuminated sign reading 'Saint Denis' suspended over street

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow cobblestone alley in heavy rain, flanked by a high brick retaining wall on the left and a historic building with columns on the right. Gas lamps cast warm light on the wet stones, and a 'Saint Denis' sign hangs overhead.

events.description: exits narrow alley into open plaza with large historic mansion visible ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching open plaza area with large illuminated mansion, moving past the end of the retaining wall

entered.detail: large two-story historic mansion with arched windows and warm interior lighting
large leafy tree in front of mansion, partially obscuring facade
wooden park bench facing the mansion

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alley into a more open plaza, a grand historic mansion with arched windows and warm lighting comes into view. A large tree and wooden bench sit in the foreground as the rain continues to fall.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes from right to left across the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through plaza as horse-drawn carriage passes by, heading toward covered walkway

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with two horses moving from right to left across the plaza

entered.detail: black horse-drawn carriage with two white horses and driver

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open plaza, a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right. The historic mansion remains visible on the right side as the camera approaches a covered walkway entrance ahead.

events.description: enters covered walkway with storefront awnings, escaping direct rain
passes close to pedestrian standing near doorway on right

agents.ego_description: walking along covered sidewalk past storefronts, sandwich board sign, and a person standing near a doorway

notable_agents.action: person standing near doorway of building, partially sheltered from rain

entered.detail: wooden awning extending over sidewalk providing shelter from rain
commercial storefront with large windows and lit interior
wooden A-frame signboard with poster on sidewalk
wooden barrel placed on sidewalk near entrance

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered commercial walkway with wooden awnings sheltering the path from rain. The camera moves past storefronts with glowing windows, a sandwich board sign, and a wooden barrel. A person stands near a doorway on the right, partially sheltered from the weather.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, rain-slicked alleyway into an open urban plaza and finally into a sheltered commercial corridor. It begins by navigating a narrow cobblestone path flanked by a high brick wall and a columned building, where gas lamps cast a warm glow over the wet stones beneath a Saint Denis sign. As the camera emerges from the alley, the space expands into a plaza featuring a grand historic mansion with arched windows, a large tree, and a wooden bench. The scene then shifts as a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right, guiding the camera toward the entrance of a covered walkway. Finally, the movement transitions under wooden awnings, passing glowing storefronts, a sandwich board, and a sheltered figure as the rain is left behind.
